author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Episode 5 of Star Atlas CORE is Out Now!

Our explorers quickly realize that the throws of the Special Investigators and Followers of the Light would have been simpler than the fates that await them, especially when their leader may be more crazy than genius.

But Gyun and Moda may be in luck as Timpo reveals that they’ve only scratched the surface of his flavorful level of crazy when the powerful Huricanno crosses their path. 

What fate does Gyun and Moda’s future hold? 

Collectible Covers  
Each episode of CORE has exclusive collectible covers available at Magic Eden and our Galactic Marketplace!

If you missed out on past covers, don't worry, you can find them here on our Galactic Marketplace: https://play.staratlas.com/market/?category=story&itemClass=graphic-novel

 | Episode 5 Star Atlas Collectible Cover: https://play.staratlas.com/market/6fRmFGHcdsJST9DVhe9frrtzH9T1B4SeysdDNokpV5X5/
 | Episode 5 Magic Eden Collectible Cover: https://magiceden.io/launchpad/star_atlas_episode_5
